MAXEK ERP — Files changed since maxek-erp-deploy-c10fac5.zip
================================================================
Generated: 2026-06-07

NOTE: c10fac5 is NOT a git commit in this repository (git only has ab313c6, 03167ca).
The c10fac5 ZIP appears to be an older deployment snapshot that predates the
June 6–7 UI/workflow finalization work. Production matching that ZIP explains
why the old UI is still visible.

ROOT CAUSE (most likely)
------------------------
The c10fac5 package was built BEFORE these files existed or were updated.
Critical NEW files missing from old packages:
  - static/css/maxek-login.css          (login redesign — without this, login looks OLD)
  - templates/forgot_password.html      (new route/page)
  - templates/users.html                (User Settings redesign)
  - app.py routes: user_settings, forgot_password, dashboard data feeds

Even if templates/login.html was partially updated, without maxek-login.css
the page renders with old styling.

================================================================
1. FILES CONTAINING NEW UI / FEATURES
================================================================

CORE APPLICATION
----------------
app.py
  - APP_VERSION = "1.0.0"
  - /settings/users (User Settings)
  - /forgot-password
  - Dashboard: approval_summary, recent_activities, welcome_name
  - MAXEK_SKIP_DEMO_SEED guard for production migration

workflow_service.py
  - get_approval_summary()
  - get_recent_activities()
  - seed_demo_users(), user_workflow_capabilities()
  - Designation sync, audit trail, reopen workflow

wsgi.py
  - Production Gunicorn entry (NEW)

requirements.txt
  - gunicorn added

LOGIN PAGE (visible UI change)
------------------------------
templates/login.html          — maxek-login-v2, construction theme, remember me
templates/forgot_password.html — NEW
static/css/maxek-login.css    — NEW (required for login redesign)

DASHBOARD (visible UI change)
-----------------------------
templates/dashboard.html      — Approval Summary, activities, notifications, approval center
static/css/maxek-dashboard.css — dash-hero, approval widgets, activity feed styles

USER SETTINGS (visible UI change)
---------------------------------
templates/users.html          — full user management UI
templates/settings.html       — links to User Settings, workflow matrix

WORKFLOW UI (modules + history)
-------------------------------
templates/macros/erp_ui.html  — transaction_view_tabs, approval_history_timeline
templates/petty_cash.html
templates/module_request.html
templates/attendance.html
templates/salary.html
templates/timesheet.html
templates/approvals.html
templates/notifications.html
templates/workflow_settings.html
templates/workflow_audit_report.html
templates/staff.html
templates/reports.html
static/js/workflow.js
static/js/maxek-ui.js
templates/base_maxek.html

DEPLOY / MIGRATION (not UI, but required for update)
----------------------------------------------------
deploy/vps_backup.sh
deploy/vps_update.sh
deploy/post_deploy_test.sh
deploy/verify_ui_on_vps.sh
deploy/migrate_production.py
deploy/migrate_db.py
deploy/UPDATE_FILES.txt
deploy/VPS_UPDATE_RUNBOOK.md
deploy/build_deploy_package.ps1

TESTS
-----
tests/test_workflow_phase.py

================================================================
2. INCLUDED IN maxek-erp-deploy-c10fac5.zip?
================================================================
Cannot inspect c10fac5.zip locally (not found in workspace).

If production UI is unchanged AND VPS files match c10fac5.zip, then c10fac5
does NOT contain the June 6–7 updates above. Verify on VPS:

  bash deploy/verify_ui_on_vps.sh /var/www/maxek_erp

Expected FAIL on old package:
  - static/css/maxek-login.css (missing or empty)
  - templates/forgot_password.html (missing)
  - templates/login.html (no "maxek-login-v2")
  - templates/dashboard.html (no "Approval Summary")

================================================================
3. FRESH DEPLOYMENT PACKAGE
================================================================
Run on Windows:
  deploy\clean_project.bat
  powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File deploy\build_deploy_package.ps1

Output:
  deploy/dist/maxek-erp-deploy-<hash>.zip
  deploy/dist/MANIFEST_<hash>.txt

Upload to VPS: /var/www/maxek_erp/
Then:
  bash deploy/vps_backup.sh /var/www/maxek_erp
  # extract/upload new zip contents
  bash deploy/vps_update.sh /var/www/maxek_erp
  bash deploy/verify_ui_on_vps.sh /var/www/maxek_erp

================================================================
BROWSER CACHE NOTE
================================================================
After correct files are on VPS, hard-refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R) or test in
private window. Nginx may cache /static — reload nginx if needed:
  sudo systemctl reload nginx
